heroes.name: Pandora
heroes.reasoning: Dodge is often needed without banner for her to survive the initial damage, otherwise, DPS can be better, but not guaranteed.
heroes.if_needed: Unique doubles the damage, additional ult is also a nice addition.

heroes.name: Asmodeus
heroes.reasoning: Similar logic to Eve's note

heroes.name: Eve
heroes.reasoning: DPS' is also fine but Dodge is just a church, also with Asmodeus in a team you kind of get away with DPS

heroes.name: Venus
heroes.reasoning: Healing might be ok someday in meta

heroes.name: Babylon
heroes.reasoning: Dodge if below 11-stars and mainly looking for PVP, otherwise DPS for her RO performance.

heroes.name: Loki
heroes.reasoning: DPS or Dodge, both are fine options, depending on what you need more.

heroes.name: Hera
heroes.reasoning: Avenger = Scales of the dodge conversion.
heroes.substat_pre_11: Irrelevant, ATK for more Death-Bomb damage

heroes.name: Jormungand
heroes.reasoning: DPS or Dodge, both are fine options, depending on what you need more.

heroes.name: Lucifer
heroes.reasoning: Dodge as she needs to stay alive to provide buffs/debuffs.
heroes.if_needed: The only hero with accuracy increase, very valuable in PvP.

heroes.name: Hades
heroes.reasoning: Dodge for a better, long-term survival, so he can proc his legendary runes more often

heroes.name: P. Arkdina
heroes.reasoning: Anything above Epic is a waste, as her runes are not coded properly.
heroes.substat_pre_11: Irrelevant, ATK for more Death-Bomb damage

heroes.name: Eudora
heroes.reasoning: DPS imo is the only real answer but I can see Dodge being ok if you're using Eudora just to CC enemies with the Elisha

heroes.name: Doris
heroes.reasoning:
If Supreme - Reflect
If Unique - Dodge

heroes.name: Catherine
heroes.reasoning: Healing helps her stack up her passive faster, and pairs nice with other Mystifier heroes that share the healing (Dullahan, Tiamat).

heroes.name: Elisha
heroes.reasoning: DPS or Dodge, both are fine options, depending on what you need more.
heroes.if_needed: Increases her damage cap, unique is a must-have,

heroes.name: Victoria
heroes.reasoning: She hits hard, but if she's not 10-12 stars I'd say Dodge is option as well

heroes.name: Wu Zetian
heroes.reasoning: Wants to live as long as possible to provide more protection to the team

heroes.name: Ying Zheng
heroes.reasoning: Avenger = Scales of the dodge conversion.

heroes.name: Hela
heroes.reasoning: Dodge all the way.

heroes.name: A. Dorabella
heroes.reasoning: Anything above Epic is a waste, as her runes are not coded properly.
heroes.if_needed: Only reason for the Epic runes is due to the ULT. Damage Substats.

heroes.name: S. Aiushtha
heroes.reasoning: Makes her an actual threat as a Dooms hero.

heroes.name: Isis
heroes.reasoning:
Avenger = Scales of the dodge conversion.
Healing is fine if she's the main tank and Pos 1 (a bit outdated tech).

heroes.name: Narissa
heroes.reasoning: Avenger = Scales of the dodge conversion.

heroes.name: Halysa
heroes.reasoning:
If Supreme - Reflect
If Unique - Dodge
heroes.if_needed: Unfortunately a benched hero due to no seasonal synergy [late game].

heroes.name: Gaia
heroes.reasoning: Before her Oath Force I'd use dodge, afterwards, DPS.

heroes.name: Audrey
heroes.reasoning: Rarely requires a dodge runes due to HS steal, Healing buffs her up further and provides sustain.

heroes.name: Dahlia
heroes.reasoning:
Early on DPS for 'carry'
Later on, switch to reflect or dodge

heroes.name: Astrid
heroes.reasoning: One of the highest single-target DPS, hits one hero but hard, if you feel like she's dying, use dodge

heroes.name: Vittoria
heroes.reasoning: To last longer for the Bind

heroes.name: Amaterasu
heroes.reasoning: Needs to live to scale up, hence the defensive runes.

heroes.name: Janna
heroes.reasoning: Avenger = Scales of the dodge conversion.

heroes.name: Karnak
heroes.reasoning: To last longer for the Bind

heroes.name: Lancelot
heroes.reasoning: To last longer for the Phantom Illusion

heroes.name: Tiamat
heroes.reasoning: Rarely takes any damage and can dish out tons of it.

heroes.name: Lee
heroes.reasoning: Full on Dodge & Basic ATK's.
heroes.if_needed: Unfortunately a benched hero due to no seasonal synergy [late game].

heroes.name: Marlena
heroes.reasoning: Wants to live as long as possible so she can apply the Pessimism from her legendary runes.

heroes.name: Albert
heroes.reasoning: Avenger = Scales of the dodge conversion.
heroes.if_needed: Unfortunately a benched hero due to no seasonal synergy [late game].

heroes.name: Sylvan
heroes.reasoning: Helps in preventing the healing from enemies.

heroes.name: Persephone
heroes.reasoning: Avenger = Scales of the dodge conversion.
heroes.if_needed: Super good when the dodge meta is prominent.

heroes.name: Lamia
heroes.reasoning: DPS pre 11-stars is OK, mainly used for RO and occasional PVP if the meta suits her.

heroes.name: Lachesis
heroes.reasoning: Avenger = Scales of the dodge conversion.

heroes.name: Dorabella
heroes.reasoning: One of the unique heroes due to her exclusive runes, purely a DPS, no longer used due to Pandora/Belt.

heroes.name: Atropos
heroes.reasoning: The only reason to get her runes would be to increase her ATK = more Pledge.

heroes.name: Diao Chan
heroes.reasoning: Only truly useful in the Tombs or Lost City Dawnbringers.

heroes.name: Aphrodite
heroes.reasoning: She's an Avenger that scales off from dodge % by converting it into ATK, on top of that she prefers to live longer for more chances of ultimates, providing more damage long-term.
heroes.if_needed: Can PI during CC + More damage

heroes.name: Leviathan
heroes.reasoning: You want to make her live as long as possible basically, Unique not as needed, but if you can afford - go for it.

heroes.name: Mavis
heroes.reasoning: Supreme and Dodge simply increases her ATK to absurd levels, Unique is nice, but Supreme doesn't even compare.

heroes.name: Althea
heroes.reasoning: Only truly unique at legendary runes but far from the priority. Wants Unique due to Celestials Synergy.

heroes.name: Cleopatra
heroes.reasoning:
DPS for PVE, Dodge for PVP.
Benefits from both Unique and Sub-stats.

heroes.name: Hecate
heroes.if_needed: Hero is hard to fit in majority of the teams due to synergy/ies.

heroes.name: Lilith
heroes.if_needed: Hero is hard to fit in majority of the teams due to synergy/ies.

heroes.name: King Arthur
heroes.reasoning: Outdated, weak hero, weak rune

heroes.name: Alice
heroes.reasoning: Strong rune + usable hero early - mid game

heroes.name: Talos
heroes.reasoning: Strong at full Legendary

heroes.name: Seraphina
heroes.reasoning: Reflect is only OK-ish if you're using her with the Lamia-Sanctuary team / Arthur-Doris team.

heroes.name: Dullahan
heroes.reasoning:
Fits his exclusive runes very nicely,

DPS shouldn't be bad either.

heroes.name: Wukong
heroes.reasoning: Not needed for his success, only for the Sub-stats

heroes.name: Mulan
heroes.reasoning: Due to her follow-up ATK's, Basic ATK kind of suits her the best, as well as DPS runes, but, Dodge broken after all.

heroes.name: RA
heroes.reasoning: Both are valid options, depends on the meta state.

heroes.name: Schrodinger
heroes.reasoning: Fits her kit.

heroes.reasoning: Strong runes for PVE.

heroes.name: Minotaur
heroes.reasoning: Pretty usable runes at 2-2 in weird Phantom Myst lineups to stall by stunning

heroes.name: Sandra

heroes.if_needed: Unfortunately a benched hero due to no seasonal synergy [late game].

heroes.name: Carola
heroes.reasoning: High potential, hard usability

heroes.reasoning: Her soak-up damage scales off her ATK, more ATK, more detonate damage.

heroes.name: Arkdina
heroes.reasoning: Avenger = Scales of the dodge conversion.

heroes.name: Odin
heroes.reasoning: Either of the two work, pick whichever you feel like using.

heroes.name: Behemoth
